title: Savory Steamed Filipino Fish Menudo
description: A tangy and aerated Filipino dish featuring fish sauce and steamed to perfection in a bamboo steamer, this savory menudo is a show-off pescatarian-friendly recipe.
instructions: Cut the fish fillet into small pieces and set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together fish sauce, lime juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fish pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 10 minutes.
Prepare the bamboo steamer by lining it with parchment paper.
Add the marinated fish to the steamer, leaving some space between each piece.
Add the chopped onion and diced tomato on top of the fish.
Steam the fish for 8 minutes or until cooked through.
Serve the steamed fish menudo hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
